items.title: Matrix multiplication as linear maps
items.description: Eigenvectors describe directions preserved by the linear transformation encoded in a square matrix.

items.title: Singular Value Decomposition
items.description: SVD generalizes eigendecomposition to rectangular matrices; eigenvalues of AᵀA give squared singular values.

items.title: PCA via covariance eigenvectors
items.description: PCA principal components are eigenvectors of the covariance matrix ordered by eigenvalue magnitude.

items.title: Norms and stretching
items.description: Eigenvalues control how much ||Av|| differs from ||v|| along eigen-directions when using induced L2 geometry.
